title: National Chiao Tung University
text: Home * Organizations * National Chiao Tung University NCTU CS Campus [1] National Chiao Tung University , (NCTU) one of Taiwan's leading public research universities located in Hsinchu , Taiwan . The Computer Games and Intelligence (CGI) laboratory is headed by professor I-Chen Wu at the Department of Computer Science [2] .
